---
title: Results
---

## Random Policy

![Random Gif](./gifs/random.gif){width=75%}


---

## Deep Q-Learning Networks (DQN)

![DQN Gif](./gifs/rllib_dqn_best.gif){width=75%}


![DQN Training Curves](./assets/dqn_training_curves.png){width=90%}

---

## Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)


![PPO Gif](./gifs/rllib_ppo_best.gif){width=75%}



![PPO Training Curves](./assets/ppo_training_curves.png){width=90%}

---

# Conclusion & Future Work



---

## Limitations



---

## Future Directions



---
